poseAssumption: neutral rest pose at load; shapes transform with live node world matrices
note: GROUND TRUTH for tests only. NEVER shipped as runtime colliders. Do not edit the generator to match these. Arm radii measured all-geometry (sleeves hug the arm); leg radii measured body/skin-only (Body_00_SKIN) to exclude the Onepiece/Tops/Skirt cloth; values are the 70th-percentile perpendicular skin distance over each bone segment's [0.15,0.85] mid-section via SkinReferenceMeasureUtilTests/testMeasureSkinReferenceRadii_U. Skull sphere + brow capsule radii measured from face/skin cranium extent. EMPIRICAL NOTE (#309): U's Skirt/Sleeve chains are parented to the limbs they cover (SkirtBack->upperLeg, Sleeve->lowerArm/hand) and ride rigidly with them, so they settle OUTSIDE these tight limb capsules and do NOT reproduce skirt-vs-leg / sleeve-vs-arm penetration under sensible static poses (nearest sleeve->arm +0.022m, nearest skirt->leg +0.087m). The only sustained U penetration is the long head-driven Hair chain vs the skull sphere (~0.039m). The limb capsules are authored ground truth for the future augmentation generator (Tasks 6-8) even though current spring dynamics don't drive contact into them. Radii were NOT loosened to manufacture limb penetration.
